title: Acme Manufacturing - Pro to Enterprise upgrade
text:
Acme Manufacturing opportunity context:
- Stage: Proposal
- Value: 15000 USD
- Expected close: 2025-12-15

Summary: Customer is exploring changes focused on automating follow-ups and reminders. Primary risk noted is duplicate contacts causing confusion. Recommended next step: build a renewal dashboard and set weekly review cadence.

title: Acme Manufacturing - Annual renewal
text:
Acme Manufacturing opportunity context:
- Stage: Qualified
- Value: 24000 USD
- Expected close: 2026-03-15

Summary: Customer is exploring changes focused on consolidating history/notes into a single customer timeline. Primary risk noted is inconsistent activity logging across the team. Recommended next step: schedule a 30‑minute admin setup call.

title: Beta Tech - New rollout
text:
Beta Tech Solutions opportunity context:
- Stage: Negotiation
- Value: 32000 USD
- Expected close: 2025-12-31

Summary: Customer is exploring changes focused on segmenting contacts for targeted campaigns. Primary risk noted is inconsistent activity logging across the team. Recommended next step: import an updated contact list and resolve duplicates.

title: Beta Tech - Analytics add-on
text:
Beta Tech Solutions opportunity context:
- Stage: Discovery
- Value: 8000 USD
- Expected close: 2026-02-15

Summary: Technical team expressed interest in analytics add-on module. Sam Clarke is evaluating requirements. Depends on successful completion of main rollout (OPP-BETA-NEW). Low-touch opportunity that can be bundled with initial contract.

title: Crown Foods - Subscription renewal
text:
Crown Foods opportunity context:
- Stage: Proposal
- Value: 18000 USD
- Expected close: 2025-12-20

Summary: Customer is exploring changes focused on segmenting contacts for targeted campaigns. Primary risk noted is inconsistent activity logging across the team. Recommended next step: create a saved group for renewals and start outreach.

title: Delta Health - Renewal
text:
Delta Health Clinics opportunity context:
- Stage: Qualified
- Value: 22000 USD
- Expected close: 2025-09-01

Summary: Customer is exploring changes focused on streamlining contact management and deduplication. Primary risk noted is inconsistent activity logging across the team. Recommended next step: schedule a 30‑minute admin setup call.

title: Delta Health - Additional clinics
text:
Delta Health Clinics opportunity context:
- Stage: Discovery
- Value: 15000 USD
- Expected close: 2026-03-01

Summary: Following successful renewal, Erin Cho mentioned plans to expand to 3 additional clinic locations in Q1 2026. Need to present multi-location pricing and training package. Key risk: budget approval from corporate.

title: Eastern Travel - Trial to paid
text:
Eastern Travel Co. opportunity context:
- Stage: New
- Value: 8000 USD
- Expected close: 2025-02-28

Summary: Customer is exploring changes focused on cleaning up pipeline stages and forecasting accuracy. Primary risk noted is low engagement from key contacts. Recommended next step: schedule a 30‑minute admin setup call.

title: Fusion Retail - Seats expansion
text:
Fusion Retail Group opportunity context:
- Stage: Qualified
- Value: 12000 USD
- Expected close: 2026-05-10

Summary: Customer is exploring changes focused on streamlining contact management and deduplication. Primary risk noted is inconsistent activity logging across the team. Recommended next step: create a saved group for renewals and start outreach.

title: Fusion Retail - Annual renewal
text:
Fusion Retail Group opportunity context:
- Stage: Closed Won
- Value: 28000 USD
- Closed: 2025-09-30

Summary: Successfully renewed annual subscription. Customer expanded from 15 to 25 seats. Strong champion support from Emma Khan drove internal adoption. Contract signed 2 weeks ahead of deadline.

title: Green Energy - Renewal 2025
text:
Green Energy Partners opportunity context:
- Stage: Closed Lost
- Value: 20000 USD
- Lost: 2025-06-15

Summary: CHURNED ACCOUNT. Customer did not renew due to budget cuts following restructuring. Carlos Mendez cited lack of clear ROI demonstration and infrequent account engagement. Post-mortem: should have implemented QBRs and usage reporting earlier. Win-back potential in 2026 after budget cycle.

title: Green Energy - Solar division rollout
text:
Green Energy Partners opportunity context:
- Stage: Closed Lost
- Value: 35000 USD
- Lost: 2025-05-10

Summary: LOST OPPORTUNITY. Expansion to solar division was cancelled when main account signaled intent to churn. Linda Park was championing internally but lost executive support. This deal collapse was early indicator of churn risk that we missed.

title: Harbor Logistics - Initial rollout
text:
Harbor Logistics opportunity context:

- Expected close: 2025-08-30

Summary: Customer is exploring changes focused on cleaning up pipeline stages and forecasting accuracy. Primary risk noted is inconsistent activity logging across the team. Recommended next step: create a saved group for renewals and start outreach.

title: Deal blocker identified
text: Upgrade deal is stalled due to pricing concerns. Anna mentioned the CFO (Beth Turner) wants to see clearer ROI justification before approving the $15k upgrade. Need to prepare ROI analysis focusing on time savings and efficiency gains.

title: Negotiation status
text: Deal in final negotiation. Lisa confirmed budget is approved. Key concerns: (1) Data migration timeline - want it done before Q2, (2) Training for 50 users needed within first month. Omar Haddad (CEO) signed off but wants weekly progress reports during rollout.

title: Renewal risk assessment
text: Delta Health renewal is AT RISK. Key issues: (1) Low usage in 3 of 5 clinics - need to re-engage users, (2) Erin Cho mentioned competitor demo scheduled for next week, (3) Open support tickets about reporting reliability. Action: Schedule urgent QBR to address concerns.

title: Expansion opportunity context
text: Despite renewal risk, expansion to 3 additional clinics is still possible if we retain the account. Erin mentioned the new clinics have different needs - more focused on patient scheduling than current analytics focus. Could be $15k expansion if renewal is secured first.

title: Renewal positive signals
text: Maria confirmed they're very satisfied with the platform. Key wins: (1) Reduced report generation time by 60%, (2) IT team loves the API flexibility, (3) Nina Foster's analytics team is expanding use cases. Should propose multi-year deal at renewal.

title: Trial conversion concerns
text: Trial extended twice due to internal IT delays at customer. Sanjay is champion but doesn't have final budget authority. Need to escalate to Ravi (CTO) for decision. Trial usage is good but conversion timeline keeps slipping.

title: Churned Accounts
text: Former customers who have cancelled. Target for win-back campaigns.

title: Decision Makers
text: Contacts with Decision Maker or Executive role who influence purchases.
